name: Rice Pudding
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the egg yolks and add the sugar and milk. Stir in the cooked rice.
2. Add the butter and raisins to the mixture.
3. Pour into a buttered baking dish.
4. Beat the egg whites until frothy. Add the powdered sugar and spread on top of the pudding.
5. Sprinkle lightly with nutmeg.
6. Bake at 325°F for 30 minutes.
